I will put my final answer inside \boxed{}.

11.36 -> 22.72
Casting input to 2 decimal places, output to 2 decimal places: 11.36 -> 22.72
factor = 22.72 / 11.36
= 0 + 1 * 2272 / 1136
= 1 + 1 * 1136 / 1136
= 2 + 1 * 0 / 1136
= 2.0 + 0.1 * 0 / 1136
= 2.00 + 0.01 * 0 / 1136
= 2.000 + 0.001 * 0 / 1136
= 2.000

factor values: 1.999, 1.999, 1.999, 1.999, 2.000
factor values (sorted): 1.999, 1.999, 1.999, 1.999, 2.000
The median factor is 1.999.

Converting 42.95:
42.95 * 1.999:
42.95 * 0.009 = 0.38655
42.95 * 0.090 = 3.86550
42.95 * 0.900 = 38.65500
42.95 * 1.000 = 42.95000
0.38655 + 3.86550 = 4.25205
4.25205 + 38.65500 = 42.90705
42.90705 + 42.95000 = 85.85705
= 85.857

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{85.857}
